bird.name: Mindoro bulbul
bird.summary: The Mindoro bulbul (Hypsipetes mindorensis) is a songbird species in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is endemic to Mindoro in the Phili…

relations.subject: Mindoro bulbul
relations.evidence: It inhabits mainly tropical moist lowland forest but has been known to inhabit moist montane forest up to 2,000 meters above sea level, and has been to known to visit cultivated areas. The International Union for Conservation of Nature does not yet recognize the Mindoro bulbul as its own species yet

relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Mindoro bulbul
relations.evidence: The forests of Mindoro threatened by habitat loss through legal and illegal logging, mining, road construction, slash-and-burn or kaingin and trapping for both food and the pet trade
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
